sourceDocument: core zone4 5 6 8 9 10 13.pdf — SCHEDULE-I, Micro Cottage Industries, trades 1-47
assumptions: "Above 1000 sq.ft." interpreted as area > 1000, not >= 1000 — modeled as from: 1000.01 to avoid an exact overlap with "Up to 1000 sq.ft." (to: 1000) at the boundary. Confirm with business user.

effectiveFrom set to 2008-07-30 (the council resolution date cited in the document header) — the document does not state a separate effective date for the fee schedule itself. Confirm with business user.

No tradeCategory condition added, since this demo scopes only Schedule I in isolation. A production spec covering all six schedules would need the tradeCategory/scheduleCode condition discussed in DESIGN.md's 'Open schema gap' section.
roundOff defaulted to NEAREST_1 (schema default) — the document does not mention rounding.
